title: Design System: The God of Time

display.purpose: Realm titles, hero headings, 'Related Realms' section title only. Cormorant Garamond 300 — never used for functional text.

headline.purpose: Tool page section headings, dialog titles, mega-menu category names at prominent scale.

body.purpose: Tool descriptions, SEO content, help text, realm card descriptions. Cap line length 65–75ch for prose.

label.purpose: Category badges, input field labels, eyebrow tags. Uppercase+tracked. One per component maximum.

mono.purpose: Timestamps, calculated numeric outputs, hex values, technical data readouts.

shadows.name: structural-default
shadows.purpose: All interactive cards and containers at rest. The system's signature.

shadows.name: structural-engaged
shadows.purpose: Same geometry as structural-default, accent color substituted. Appears on hover state of category cards and branded buttons.

shadows.name: structural-minor
shadows.purpose: Smaller interactive elements: nav pills, emoji avatar circles, count badges.

shadows.name: ambient-overlay
shadows.purpose: Floating surfaces only — Radix dropdowns, select menus, popovers. Never for card-level content.

shadows.name: ambient-dialog
shadows.purpose: Modal dialogs only. Maximum ambient depth in the system.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus state only. Accessibility affordance, not decoration.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: General state transitions (border, background, color). Duration 150ms.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Entrance animations: mega-menu slide, mobile drawer, hover scale reveals.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Standard hover state: color, border, shadow shifts.

motion.name: duration-reveal
motion.purpose: Panel entrances, mega-menu open, mobile drawer.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile: single-column tool grids, realm grid collapses, side panels hidden.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Realm body grid collapses from 3-column to 1-column.

breakpoints.name: compact
breakpoints.purpose: Realm side panels narrow from 220px to 160px.

breakpoints.name: wide
breakpoints.purpose: Max content width. Beyond this, content centers.

components.name: Calculate Button (Primary CTA)
components.description: The primary action on every tool page. Full width of the input zone. Color = current tool domain accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-calculate { width: 100%; height: 52px; background-color: #52C4A0; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #1E1E2E; transition: box-shadow 150ms, transform 100ms; } .ds-btn-calculate:hover { background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.08), rgba(0,0,0,0.08)); box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #52C4A0; } .ds-btn-calculate:active { background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.15), rgba(0,0,0,0.15)); transform: scale(0.99); box-shadow: 2px 2px 0px 0px #1E1E2E; } .ds-btn-calculate:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #52C4A0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button (Copy / Share)
components.description: Secondary pill actions below tool results. Hover shifts border and text to category accent.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background-color: transparent; border: 1px solid #1E1E2E; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 400; color: #6B6B80; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #52C4A0; color: #52C4A0; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #52C4A0; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tool Input Field
components.description: 48px precision input with uppercase label. Focus ring uses category accent.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-input-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #6B6B80; display: block; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-input-field { height: 48px; width: 100%; background-color: #0D0D14; border: 1px solid #1E1E2E; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #E8E8F0; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input-field::placeholder { color: #3A3A50; } .ds-input-field:focus { border: 2px solid #52C4A0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(82,196,160,0.125); }

components.name: Category Card (Nav Mega-menu)
components.description: Navigation discovery card with emoji avatar cluster and hard-offset shadow. Border and shadow shift to category accent on hover.
components.html:
Space & Cosmos
🪐💥🚀⭐
+4
components.css: .ds-card-category { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 20px; background-color: #0D0D14; border: 2px solid #1E1E2E; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #1E1E2E; transition: border-color 200ms, box-shadow 200ms, background-color 200ms; cursor: pointer; min-width: 200px; } .ds-card-category:hover { border-color: #4B8EF1; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0px 0px #4B8EF1; background-color: #16162A; } .ds-cat-name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #6B6B80; display: block; margin-bottom: 12px; transition: color 200ms; } .ds-card-category:hover .ds-cat-name { color: #4B8EF1; } .ds-cat-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-avatar-cluster { display: flex; } .ds-avatar { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: #12121C; border: 2px solid #E8E8F0; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 14px; margin-left: -8px; box-shadow: 1px 1px 0px 0px #1E1E2E; transition: transform 150ms; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-avatar:first-child { margin-left: 0; } .ds-avatar:hover { transform: scale(1.15) translateY(-3px); z-index: 10; } .ds-count-badge { height: 32px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: 50px; border: 2px solid #E8E8F0; background-color: #12121C; font-family: JetBrains Mono, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #E8E8F0; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 1px 1px 0px 0px #1E1E2E; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Category Badge / Chip
components.description: Accent pill badge. Color driven by --badge-color CSS var. One per component maximum.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 12px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: var(--badge-color, #4B8EF1); background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--badge-color, #4B8EF1) 12%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--badge-color, #4B8EF1) 30%, transparent); white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Realm Card
components.description: Atmospheric realm discovery card with radial accent glow and gradient overlay. Display serif title over muted description.
components.html:
Space & Cosmos

Relativistic Travel

How much younger would you be after a near-light-speed round trip?
components.css: .ds-realm-card { position: relative; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #1E1E2E; background-color: #12121C; overflow: hidden; height: 320px; transition: transform 300ms, border-color 300ms; cursor: pointer; } .ds-realm-card:hover { transform: scale(1.01); border-color: #4B8EF1; } .ds-realm-glow { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at top, color-mix(in srgb, #4B8EF1 8%, transparent), transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; } .ds-realm-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 10; background: linear-gradient(to top, #06060A 40%, color-mix(in srgb, #06060A 50%, transparent) 70%, transparent 100%); pointer-events: none; } .ds-realm-content { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 20; padding: 28px; } .ds-realm-title { font-family: Cormorant Garamond, Georgia, serif; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 300; color: #E8E8F0; line-height: 1.2; margin: 12px 0 8px; } .ds-realm-desc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #6B6B80; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; max-width: 360px; }

components.name: Navigation Logo
components.description: The ✦ GOD OF TIME wordmark. Cormorant Garamond light, wide tracking. The ✦ mark is part of the logotype.
components.css: .ds-nav-logo { font-family: Cormorant Garamond, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 300; font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: 0.25em; color: #E8E8F0; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 200ms; } .ds-nav-logo:hover { opacity: 0.8; }

narrative.overview:
Tools that work. A room that shouldn't exist. The payroll calculator and the black hole simulator live side by side — and neither apologizes for the other. This is the design philosophy of The God of Time: a dark, commanding space where precision instrumentation and cosmic wonder occupy the same architecture. Nothing is decorative. Everything pulls weight.

The visual system operates from a deep void. Not dark mode as aesthetic gesture — darkness as deliberate identity. Time at cosmic scale is experienced in the dark. The ten-color accent system maps directly to content categories: each discipline carries its own spectral signal. Color is information. The palette never blends into a unified gradient; each accent is a distinct instrument reading.

Elevation is structural, not atmospheric. The signature 4×4px hard-offset shadow carries no blur; it marks the physical boundary of a surface — a panel extruded from a switchboard. On hover, the shadow color shifts to the category accent, confirming which instrument is being engaged. Components feel retro-mechanical: buttons press, cards lift, inputs acknowledge.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-first at every scale: tool pages, realm pages, navigation, dialogs
Ten-signal accent system where color = category identity, never decoration
Brutalist-structural elevation: hard 4px offset, no blur, no ambient glow
Cormorant Garamond light serif for cosmic display; Inter for all functional text; JetBrains Mono for data
Retro-mechanical components: physical weight in hover states, tactile input acknowledgment
Two registers, one voice — tool pages are precise, realm pages are cosmic, same brand at different intensity

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Category accent colors are semantic bindings, not aesthetic choices. Cosmos Blue on a realm card means Space & Cosmos. Applying Cosmos Blue to a health tool is a misinformation error. If a new category is added, create a new named accent; do not reuse an existing one.

rules.name: The No-Ambient-Glow Rule
rules.body: Accent colors do not radiate. No box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--accent). No gradient-glowing text. The only permitted accent bloom is the 4px input focus ring, which communicates keyboard state, not decoration.

rules.name: The One-Instrument Rule
rules.body: Cormorant Garamond is for cosmic content only — realm titles, hero headings, Related Realms section heading. It does not appear on tool-page H1s, form labels, button text, or helper copy. When in doubt, use Inter.

rules.name: The Label Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels appear at most once per component — category badge OR input label, never both simultaneously. The pattern reads as deliberate when rare; it reads as AI grammar when applied to every text element.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: box-shadow: 0 0 Xpx — zero x/y offset, positive blur radius — is prohibited for all content surfaces. The one exception is the keyboard focus ring (0 0 0 4px color-mix), which is an accessibility affordance, not decoration.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Every surface is flat at rest. Shadows appear only in response to interactive state: hover, focus, active. A content card with a shadow at rest is a design error — either make it interactive or remove the shadow.

dos: Do use #06060A (Void Black) as the page background for all dark-mode surfaces. It is the correct floor; lighter values weaken the identity.
Do apply 4px 4px 0px 0px var(--border) (no blur) to all interactive card-level components at rest. Shift the shadow color to the category accent on hover.

Do match accent color to content category exactly — Cosmos Blue for space, Bio Gold for biology, Paradox Violet for sci-fi, Whim Teal for whimsical, Destiny Amber for personal destiny, and each utility color for its domain.
Do use Cormorant Garamond 300 for realm titles, hero headings, and cosmic-register display text only. Inter handles all functional text.
Do keep the I/O rocker switch for the theme toggle. It is a brand signature, not a quirky add-on.
Do carry the brand into tool pages — precise, not clinical. Dark palette, structured typography, and the category accent color all apply on tool pages.
Do use the emoji avatar cluster pattern for discovery navigation — 32px circles, stacked with -8px overlap, 2px ink-primary border.
Do check --text-muted (#6B6B80) contrast at small sizes (≤12px). It passes at 14px+ but is close to the 4.5:1 minimum at body scale.
Do include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives for every transition or animation.
donts: Don't use warm-neutral or cream backgrounds. The SaaS / Notion-clone failure mode begins with near-white or warm-tinted bodies. The light-mode bg-base (#F4F3EF) is the maximum warmth in the system; it is never the dark-mode default.
Don't use ambient glow shadows (box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--accent)). The only permitted zero-offset blur is the 4px keyboard focus ring — an accessibility signal, not an aesthetic effect.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient background). All text uses a single solid color. Emphasis is through weight and size, not gradient.
Don't use border-left or border-right thicker than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, callouts, or list items. Use background tints, full borders, or accent badges instead.

Don't use glassmorphism as a default card treatment. Backdrop-blur is permitted in exactly two places: the navbar on scroll (functional) and the realm-enter hover badge (purposeful reveal). Never on static content cards.
Don't make tool pages feel like a government utility: grey tables, clinical sans-serif headlines, neutral blue CTAs. The Cosmic Instrument Room aesthetic carries into every tool page.
Don't introduce accent colors outside the ten-color system. If a new category is added, create a new named token; do not reuse an existing accent for a different category.
Don't animate layout properties or use bounce/elastic easing. All transitions use ease-out curves (150–300ms). Every animated element needs a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Don't apply uppercase tracked labels to every text element. One per component is the ceiling. Overuse produces AI grammar, not design voice.
Don't replace the I/O rocker switch with a sun/moon icon or rounded pill toggle. Replacing it is a brand regression.
Don't use Cormorant Garamond on tool-page headings, form labels, or CTA buttons. It belongs to cosmic content only; functional text is always Inter.
